title: Traffic Split Rollout
subtitle: New API version rollout causes unstable behavior
objective: Build a safe rollout topology with controlled entry and resilient fallback storage.

concepts.title: Controlled Entry
concepts.description: Load balancer must front API rollout surface.

concepts.title: Stability Cache
concepts.description: Cache helps absorb repeated reads during rollout.

concepts.title: Durable Backend
concepts.description: Persist rollout writes in durable database.
